query:
-- New contacts created in last night's pipeline run (after 8pm UTC 18 Jun)
SELECT 
  contactTrustTier,
  enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-06-18 20:00:00'
GROUP BY contactTrustTier, enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC;
